subject: Member requesting to join Warp
body:
sameer888@gmail.com has asked to join the Warp group.

Message from sameer888@gmail.com:
My name is Dr. Sameer Singh and I am a Group Leader at the Charité-Universitätsmedizin in Berlin. I am a structural biologist by training and am currently employing cryo-ET in studies involving human cells. I would greatly benefit from the collective expertise in the group. Thank you very much.
